title: abelicea keaki
intro: Ablicea keaki, also known as the New Zealand tea tree or Kawa kawa, is a species of flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been used for centuries in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are due to the presence of alkaloids and other compounds. The health benefits of Abelicea keaki include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve muscle and joint pain, and even help with anxiety and stress relief. Abelicea keaki can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
